[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001 2
1 1111010 5
2 0100001 2
3 1001000 2
4 1110010 4
5 1101011 5
6 1000001 2
7 0011010 3

01 10 0000000 a
12 21 0001000 1
23 32 0100000 1
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0011010 3 match 7
56 65 0010001 2
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 1000000 1

02 20 1010010 3
13 31 0000001 1
24 42 0011010 3 match 7
35 53 0100001 2 match 2
46 64 0010000 1
57 75 1100000 2
60 06 0010000 1
71 17 0000000 a

14 41 0001000 1
25 52 1111010 5 match 1
36 63 0000001 1
47 74 0000000 a
50 05 1010010 3
61 16 0000001 1
72 27 1100000 2

04 40 0010010 2
15 51 0001001 2 match 0
26 62 0010000 1
37 73 0100000 1
